label: default agent • create a weekly schedule
query: Every Monday at 09:30, have the agent e3a7c1d4-5b29-4f80-9a6e-1c8d2f5b3079 post a weekly report. Set that up.
notes: action 'create' with frequency 'weekly' (frequency_value names a weekday, frequency_time_of_day=09:30). The weekly parser accepts a full day name ("Monday") or the 3-letter form ("MON") — the eval matrix surfaced that a MON-only parser sent the model into a retry loop since it naturally emits "Monday". A custom agent is seeded at the referenced id so create SUCCEEDS (correct weekly mapping + a real schedule) instead of looping on a not-found agent — the agent is torn down after the case. The selection assertion pins action + the weekly frequency enum, proving the model maps "every Monday" onto weekly rather than daily/cron.
